zh.lifeSummary: 當Major John Freeman於1626年1月28日在英國素可比林書爾斯特受洗時，他的父親Edmund Freeman II29歲，母親Bennet Hodsoll29歲。他於1649年2月13日與Mercy Prence在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1719年10月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦享年93歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦可福 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Major John Freeman于1626年1月28日在英国素可比林書爾斯特受洗时，他的父亲Edmund Freeman II29岁，母亲Bennet Hodsoll29岁。他于1649年2月13日与Mercy Prence在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1719年10月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦享年93岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦可福 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Freeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English freman, fremon ‘freeman, free-born man’ (Old English frēomann, frīgmann), used also occasionally as a personal name. As an African American surname it was in many cases adopted as a name denoting a man freed of slavery. See also Fryman and Free .
Irish: Anglicized (‘translated’) form of Gaelic Ó Saoraidhe (see Seery ).

variants.name: Free
meanings: English: nickname or status name from Middle English fre ‘free’ (Old English frēo), with reference to either tenurial status (‘free born’) or to character (‘noble, generous, open-handed’).
Americanized form of Swiss German and German   Frei   and   Frey  .

variants.name: Fryman
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German Frymann or German Freimann (see Freiman ), and possibly also of the Dutch cognate Vrijman.
English: from Middle English friman ‘free-born man’ (Old English frīomann, frīgmann), symonymous with Freeman 1.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: Oldest Grave seen in the Memorials List

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Major John Freeman was christened on 28 January 1626, in Billingshurst, Sussex, England, his father, Edmund Freeman II, was 29 and his mother, Bennet Hodsoll, was 29. He married Mercy Prence on 13 February 1649, in Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 28 October 1719, in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 93, and was buried in Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Major John Freeman a été baptisé le 28 janvier 1626, à Billingshurst, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Freeman II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Bennet Hodsoll, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mercy Prence le 13 février 1649, à Eastham, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 28 octobre 1719, à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Major John Freeman am 28. Januar 1626 in Billingshurst, Sussex, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Freeman II 29 und seine Mutter Bennet Hodsoll 29. Er hat am 13. Februar 1649 in Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Mercy Prence geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Oktober 1719 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Major John Freeman è stato battezzato il 28 gennaio 1626 nel Billingshurst, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Edmund Freeman II, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Bennet Hodsoll, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Mercy Prence il 13 febbraio 1649, nel Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 28 ottobre 1719, nel Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolto a Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Major John Freemanが1626年1月28日にイギリススセックスビリングシュルストで洗礼を受けた時，父Edmund Freeman IIは29歳，母Bennet Hodsollは29歳であった。1649年2月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーエアスサムでMercy Prenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1719年10月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムで93歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルエアスサムコブ ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Major John Freeman(이)가 1626년 1월 28일 영국 수세스 빌링슈르스트에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Freeman II(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Bennet Hodsoll(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1649년 2월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 이스섬에서 Mercy Prence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1719년 10월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 이스섬 커브 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Major John Freeman foi batizado em 28 de janeiro de 1626, em Billingshurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Freeman II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Bennet Hodsoll, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mercy Prence em 13 de fevereiro de 1649, em Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1719, em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 93 anos, e foi sepultado em Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Major John Freeman был крещен 28 января 1626 г. в местности биллингшурст, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Freeman II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Bennet Hodsoll, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mercy Prence 13 февраля 1649 г. в местности эастам, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 28 октября 1719 г. в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности ков буринг гроунд, эастам, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Major John Freeman se bautizó el 28 de enero de 1626, en Billingshurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Freeman II, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Bennet Hodsoll, tenía 29 años.
